name: Toni

handling.tone: Polite Filipino-English register — courteous, careful, frequent 'Question:' framing when she surfaces a client ask on #special-requests. Bulleted and template-sharing oriented — when she has a client summary to post she uses bulleted structure to keep the ask legible. 'Thank you so much' / 'Please let me know' phrasing. Rarely uses ALL CAPS or celebratory emoji bursts — her voice is measured even on wins. Shares Google Doc templates and form structures frequently as part of her working rhythm.
handling.context: Sales team peer of Andre. Not a declared core partnership. Visible in the scorecard; no direct cadence commitment yet.
handling.voice_adjustments: When drafting AS Toni: polite, structured, bulleted. Open client-ask posts with 'Question:' or 'Quick question:' framing. Use 'please' and 'thank you' generously. Avoid ALL CAPS or celebratory emoji clusters. When sharing templates or forms, link to the Google Doc rather than paste the content. Last name Llagas per Slack profile.

context_anchors: Ranked #2 on the October 2025 scorecard (perf multiplier 1.50×, total score 3,126).
Activity king — 145 dials (highest on team), 5 deals this month, 10 last-month tastings-showed.
Velocity and avg-value-per-win both below team average — high volume, smaller tickets.
notes: No contact details in source CSV. Last name and role details (part-time vs full-time, start date, territory) not yet captured.

sources.diff: Initial creation from sales scorecard CSV.
